query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.title,
  c.company,
  c.email,
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.roleRelevance,
  c.rejectionReason,
  GROUP_CONCAT(cp.projectId) as linkedProjectIds
FROM contacts c
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE c.id IN (1080026, 1080027, 1080028)
GROUP BY c.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.name,
  c.title,
  c.company,
  c.email,
  c.contactTrustTier,
  c.roleRelevance,
  c.rejectionReason,
  GROUP_CONCAT(cp.projectId) as linkedProjectIds
FROM contacts c
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
WHERE c.id IN (1080026, 1080027, 1080028)
GROUP BY c.id;
